title: No judge-specific information on corruption, misconduct allegations: Supreme Court to Delhi High Court
description: The Supreme Court of India told the Delhi High Court on Wednesday that it does not maintain judge-specific information about allegations of corruption or misconduct. Advocate Rukhmini Bobde appeared for the public information officer of the Supreme Court and stated that even collating such information may not be possible, as it would involve diverting significant resources. The lawyer made the submission before Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav during the hearing of a plea fi
